a_excerpt:
I don't have a K10 datasheet in the wiki — only K8 and K3 are ingested. The wiki has no `src-kooltherm-k10` page, and "K10" doesn't appear in any catalogued source.

Check the raw library for a Kooltherm K10 datasheet, or grab R-values dire

**Kooltherm K10 G2 product R-values** (declared, at 23°C):

| Thickness | Product R-value |
|-----------|----------------|
| 25 mm | R1.10 |
| 30 mm | R1.30 |
| 40 mm | R1.70 |
| 45 mm | R2.00 |
| 50 mm | R2.25 |
| 60 mm | R2.70 |
| 70 mm |
